title: Tevita Leo-Latu
description: NZ & Tonga international rugby league footballer
extract: Tevita Leo-Latu (born 3 July 1981) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a hooker for the Point Chevalier Pirates. He previously played for the New Zealand Warriors and the Cronulla-Sutherland Sharks in the NRL and the Wakefield Trinity Wildcats in the Super League.
